calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION For Relief From Potential Waiver Of Discovery Objections
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's Motion For Relief From Potential Waiver Of Discovery Objections is off calendar. Plaintiff filed a Notice of Settlement of Entire Case on December 6, 2017. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION For Relief From Potential Waiver Of Discovery Objections
Off Calendar Nov-22-2017 Continued To Dec-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's Motion For Relief From Potential Waiver Of Discovery Objections is Continued to December 13, 2017 because Pro Tem Judge Zandt has recused himself from this case. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
